description: Official Westside Wolverines team tee in heather charcoal with the full-color Wolverines logo screen-printed on the chest. Soft 100% ringspun cotton, pre-shrunk, unisex fit. Ships from our Detroit team store. Show your Wolverines pride at every game.
name: Wolverines Team Tee

description: Adjustable Westside Wolverines cap with an embroidered Wolverines logo on the front panel and a snapback closure for one-size-fits-most comfort. Structured six-panel crown holds its shape game after game. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Cap — Adjustable

description: Heavyweight Westside Wolverines pullover hoodie in navy with a kangaroo pocket and the Wolverines wordmark across the chest. Brushed fleece interior keeps players and parents warm on chilly Detroit evenings at the ballpark. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Pullover Hoodie

description: Sturdy canvas Westside Wolverines tote bag with reinforced handles and a printed Wolverines logo on both sides. Perfect for hauling gear, snacks, and scorebooks to the diamond. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Westside Wolverines Canvas Tote

description: Insulated 24 oz Westside Wolverines stainless steel water bottle with a leak-proof lid and the Wolverines logo laser-etched on the side. Keeps water cold through doubleheaders. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Insulated Water Bottle

description: Weatherproof Westside Wolverines car magnet with the team logo on a durable, fade-resistant magnetic backing. Sticks to any steel vehicle panel and peels off clean. Show off your Wolverines from the parking lot. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Car Magnet

description: Classic Westside Wolverines hooded sweatshirt in athletic gray with a drawstring hood, ribbed cuffs, and a large Wolverines logo printed on the front. Cozy midweight fleece for practice and the stands. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Hooded Sweatshirt

description: Warm knit Westside Wolverines beanie in navy with a cuffed brim and an embroidered Wolverines patch. Keeps everyone toasty at late-season games. One size fits most. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Knit Beanie

description: Padded Westside Wolverines stadium cushion with a water-resistant base and the Wolverines logo printed on top. Makes those metal bleachers bearable through extra innings. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Stadium Cushion

description: Glossy vinyl Westside Wolverines bumper sticker with the team logo and tagline. UV-coated to resist Detroit weather and car washes. A small, affordable way to rep the Wolverines everywhere you drive. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Bumper Sticker

description: Game-ready Westside Wolverines softball jersey in moisture-wicking polyester with the team name, custom number, and Wolverines crest. Mesh side panels keep players cool. Available in youth and adult sizing. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Softball Jersey

description: Lightweight Westside Wolverines performance long-sleeve tee in royal blue with a tonal Wolverines logo. UPF 30 fabric protects players during long sunny tournaments. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Performance Long-Sleeve

description: Curved-brim Westside Wolverines fitted ball cap in navy with a raised embroidered Wolverines logo and moisture-wicking sweatband. Looks sharp on the field and off. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Fitted Ball Cap

description: Neoprene Westside Wolverines can koozie that keeps drinks cold in the stands and folds flat for easy packing. Printed Wolverines logo on both sides. A tailgate must-have. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Can Koozie

description: Weatherproof Westside Wolverines yard sign with a metal H-stake included. Double-sided print so neighbors see the Wolverines pride from both directions. Great for game-day and senior-night displays. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Yard Sign

description: Die-cut Westside Wolverines vinyl car decal that adheres to windows and bumpers with a clean, transfer-tape application. Weatherproof and removable. Perfect for the family minivan headed to the tournament. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Car Decal

description: Quarter-zip Westside Wolverines pullover in charcoal with a stand-up collar, embroidered Wolverines logo on the left chest, and a smooth poly-fleece face. Sharp layer for coaches and parents on the sideline. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Quarter-Zip Pullover

description: Stainless steel Westside Wolverines travel mug with a 16 oz capacity, spill-resistant lid, and the Wolverines logo wrapped around the body. Keeps coffee hot for early Saturday game calls. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Travel Mug

description: Youth-sized Westside Wolverines team tee in royal blue with the Wolverines logo printed front and center. Soft, durable cotton blend built for the littlest fans and bench players. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Youth Team Tee

description: Plush Westside Wolverines stadium blanket in navy with a woven Wolverines logo and fringed edges. Folds into a carry strap for chilly playoff nights at the diamond. Machine washable. Ships from our Detroit team store.
name: Wolverines Stadium Blanket
